info.description: HTTP API for the Fiber boilerplate authentication and health endpoints.
info.title: Fiber Boilerplate API

post.description: Generates an OTP challenge for password reset.
Validates credentials and returns an OTP challenge.
Revokes a refresh token and logs the current client out.

get.description: Returns the profile of the authenticated user.

post.description: Verifies an OTP challenge and returns access and refresh tokens.
Exchanges a refresh token for a new access token pair.
Creates a user account and returns access and refresh tokens.
Resets a user's password after OTP verification.

get.description: Returns all sessions for the authenticated user.

post.description: Revokes one session belonging to the authenticated user.
Revokes all sessions for the authenticated user.
